records.summary: Three Boons Yoga Berlin offers a 180+hour foundational yoga teacher training called 'The Art of Teaching Yoga I,' running over 8 weeks across April–May 2027, with in-person and online options.
records.trainingName: The Art of Teaching Yoga I: Three Boons 180+HR Yoga Teacher Training
records.notes: Dates and hours are clearly stated, but price is absent from the provided content and philosophy-heavy copy appears before key facts, hurting conversion; no teacher bios, schema markup, or reviews are evident.

records.summary: An advanced 153+hour yoga teacher training for existing certified teachers, running May 30–July 12, 2026 in Berlin-Mitte (or online), priced at 1,899 EUR with payment plan options.
records.trainingName: The Art of Teaching Yoga II: Three Boons 153+HR Advanced Yoga Teacher Training
records.notes: Price and dates are present but buried after lengthy prerequisite and philosophy copy; no teacher bios, student reviews, or structured schema are evident, limiting both conversion and SEO performance.

records.summary: A 15+hour Bhakti Yoga mantra and harmonium weekend training at Three Boons Yoga Berlin on February 7–8, 2026, priced at 279–333 EUR, open to all levels with no prerequisites.
records.trainingName: The Art of Bhakti Yoga: Three Boons 15+HR Mantra & Harmonium Training
records.price: 333 EUR (or 279 EUR with own harmonium); 18% discount for certified Jivamukti/3Boons teachers
records.notes: Best-structured page of the set — dates, price, curriculum topics, and a detailed teacher bio are all present; direct booking via Eversports aids conversion, though price and dates still appear mid-page rather than at the very top.

records.pageName: Three Boons 630+HR Yoga Teacher Mentoring Program
records.summary: A long-form 630+hour one-on-one yoga teacher mentoring program at Three Boons Yoga Berlin, spanning 3 months to 2 years, priced at 10 monthly installments of 333 EUR, for teachers already certified within the Jivamukti/Three Boons lineage.
records.trainingName: The Art of Teaching Yoga III: Three Boons 630+HR Yoga Teacher Mentoring Program
records.price: 10 x 333 EUR per month (3,330 EUR total minimum)
records.dates: Rolling / application-based, no fixed dates listed
records.notes: Mentor names are listed but without bios or photos; no fixed dates reduces urgency, and the application-only model makes a direct booking CTA impossible, lowering conversion; SEO is weakened by no schema, no reviews, and a generic page structure.
